subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He unto Whom belongeth the dominion of the heavens and of the earth, Who setteth forth in the Book the ordinances of all things and expoundeth the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من له ملک السموات و الارض یبین فی الکتاب احکام کل شیء و یفصل الایات
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
